commands.repair_reason: This maintainer-labeled Telegram authorization PR needs maintainer/live-proof review; there is no narrow automation repair to queue from the current diff.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found in the diff; the changed authorization path still fails closed, but needs live Telegram proof before merge confidence is high. commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Telegram DM pairing authorization to avoid false pairing prompts after pairing-store read failures, skip unnecessary store reads for configured/open DMs, preserve text-fragment pairing checks, and add focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main converts pairing-store read failures into an empty allowlist before DM access, and the PR adds mocked regressions for that path; I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This maintainer-labeled Telegram authorization PR needs maintainer/live-proof review; there is no narrow automation repair to queue from the current diff.
